title: Wilbur Optimization Backlog
description: Schema for Wilbur's ROI-gated optimization backlog. Items accumulate privately and are surfaced only when accumulated ROI justifies interruption.

created_at.description: When this backlog file was created

category.description: Classification of what kind of optimization this is

estimated_value.description: Expected impact on session quality, system coherence, or drift reduction (0-10)

confidence.description: How certain is the projected improvement? (0.0-1.0)

time_sensitivity.description: How time-sensitive is this optimization? urgent bypasses accumulation.

tangential_areas.description: Other spoke/module areas where this same improvement should be adopted in the same propagation wave

estimated_cost.description: Normalized token + attention cost. low=1, medium=3, high=7

status.description: Lifecycle state of this optimization opportunity

discovered_at.description: Session ID where this optimization was discovered (e.g. session-20260525-1200)

source.description: Which Wilbur component identified this opportunity

related_lug_ids.description: Existing lugs that are related to or partially cover this optimization

projected_roi.description: Computed ROI = (estimated_value * confidence) / cost_normalized. Populated by Wilbur when item is evaluated.

rationale.description: Why this optimization was identified and what value it provides

surfaced_at.description: Session ID when this was surfaced to Mario (if status >= surfaced)

mario_decision.description: Mario's decision on the propagation proposal (if status = surfaced)

propagation_lugs.description: Lug IDs created as part of the ratified propagation plan
